About Me

Hi I am Erik Kizior ,
I’m a junior at UC Berkeley studying Electrical Engineering and Computer Science. I hail from central California, where I graduated from Clovis North High School as Valedictorian and a National Merit Scholar in 2021. My academic interests include CS education and game development. Outside of class, I enjoy working out, climbing, teaching music, and gaming. I am actively seeking software engineering internship opportunities for the upcoming summer, and I welcome all relevant contacts.

Undergraduate Student Instructor (uGSI), UC Berkeley EECS

2022 — present

Instructed 30+ students in weekly 2-hour discussion in the implementation of various data structures such as HashMaps, Deques, Disjoint Sets, B-Trees. Led students through 24 labs, 4 projects, and 4 homework assignments in weekly office hours. Led internal projects team in developing detailed project specifications, auto grader infrastructure, and optimized solutions. Exemplified leadership by managing the classroom, fostering a collaborative and equitable learning environment. Assisted 6 struggling students in support meetings by connecting them with academic & mental health resources
